title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Possess Me, Satan**
*2026*
Use your role's ability to find the ghost and exorcise them.
![Possess Me, Satan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_781eaf34.jpg)

2. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_77759d2a.jpg)

3. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_6f28eae4.png)

4. **The Queen's Dilemma**
*2026*
Leaders join in council to vote on the kingdom’s issues, but with hidden motives!
![The Queen's Dilemma](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_03ece95e.jpg)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_beb6a292.png)

6. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_b722fa66.jpg)

7. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_11aec112.png)

8. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_cfc7d471.jpg)

9. **Shards of Creation**
*2026*
Harness the primal forces of Brandon Sanderson's Cosmere.
![Shards of Creation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_397f1c71.jpg)

10. **First Giants**
*2026*
Dinosaurs, flying reptiles & giant mammals — create the most prestigious exhibition!
![First Giants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_46ecb049.png)

11. **Morty Sorty Magic Shop**
*2026*
Apprentices try to demonstrate their talent for stocking the shelves.
![Morty Sorty Magic Shop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_b75435ce.jpg)

12. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_b8f1ad5d.jpg)

13. **Let's Go! To France**
*2026*
Create a travel itinerary and go on your dream vacation to France.
![Let's Go! To France](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_cb5e4fdf.jpg)

14. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_a346f612.jpg)

15. **The Legacy of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_bc469a09.jpg)

16. **DNUP**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![DNUP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_81cf7600.jpg)

17. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_b6ed4980.jpg)

18. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_c942c6e0.png)

19. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_5179f1fc.jpg)

20. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_fff13c64.jpg)

21. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_e772f4a8.jpg)

22. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_5f114392.jpg)

23. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_252242b7.jpg)

24. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_5c4bcb15.jpg)

25. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_804970c7.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_121e83da.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_15d9e919.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_d37f4458.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_636e4c9e.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_1079ab88.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_07018dd8.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_f16f3eca.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*115 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*41 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_6049e878.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_89badfbb.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_ea97d8b5.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_1d5f61bc.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_f97bc76b.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_921f0b9b.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_b8791f5c.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_ae96f37c.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_82fc8b36.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*10 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_a4840efe.jpg)

19. **Brass: Birmingham**
*17 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_f0af63f1.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*10 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_f55a5550.jpg)

21. **Magical Athlete**
*3 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_16d98529.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*274 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_622a83d4.jpg)

23. **The White Castle**
*30 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_9c55f822.jpg)

24. **SCOUT**
*41 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_6784d5b1.png)

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-26/toplist/bgg_6654b310.jpg)
